generated_notice: This file is assembled from projects/*/metadata.json by prepare_deploy.py. Do not hand-edit. CI regenerates and diffs it; builds fail if the committed aggregate is stale.

relationship_types.depends_on: Build/init-time dependency. MUST be acyclic. Enforced by validator.
relationship_types.integrates_with: Peer integration. Cycles allowed. Not enforced acyclic.
relationship_types.provides_to: Capability exposed to others. Cycles allowed.
relationship_types.consumes_from: Capability consumed from others. Cycles allowed.
relationship_types.supersedes: Replaces a prior system. Acyclic by nature.
